scene.message: Ayase: Ayase's never been{nl} anywhere like this before.{waitkey}{ret}
Student: Ah! You're not here{nl} to peep, are you?!{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: D-don't be stupid! As{nl} if I'd peep at you lot...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: {wait_fr:32}I'm tel-ling-you{wait_fr:21}{nl} it's not peeping, I said!!{waitkey}{ret}
